context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. ADR-071 defines workspace namespace policy: Refarm defaults to .refarm sidecar state and allows external root namespaces only through declaration.
current_tasks: Commit d5c5dc1d records ADR-071 workspace namespace policy plus decision-log, ADR index, daily-driver, extensibility, and process playbook alignment.
Policy decision: refarm.config.json is versioned project policy; .refarm/ is Refarm-owned local sidecar; .project/ is a declared Pi/workflow compatibility namespace, not Refarm's semantic center.
Policy decision: the Refarm coding agent does not get a new root directory by default; Refarm-owned agent state should live under .refarm/agents, sessions, handoff, and runtime.
Validated docs slice with git diff --check and refarm agent finish after-edit/after-commit; no package workspaces were affected.
next_actions: Implement workspaceNamespaces policy shape in refarm.config.json/schema and teach health/check to report undeclared namespace drift as warnings first.
After namespace audit exists, declare current compatibility namespaces such as .project and ignored integration caches such as .pi-lens with owner/purpose/persistence/access.
Continue pre-publication naming audit on remaining generic SDK/engine surfaces after namespace policy hardening is planned or split into bite-sized tasks.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
